pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly require creating and checking a location named 'Berlin Branch'.
Task description instructs setting the Currency override to 'EUR'. export_result.sh queries this field.
Task description instructs creating a new Supplier named 'Berlin Tech Wholesale', checked by export_result.sh.
Task description requires changing the employee's title to 'Country Manager', which is queried in export_result.sh.
setup_task.sh explicitly provisions an asset with asset_tag='ASSET-MAC-088', which must be updated per instructions.
Task description and export_result.sh mandate the creation and querying of an asset model named 'HP Color LaserJet Pro M479fdw'.
Task description instructs creating an asset with asset_tag 'ASSET-BER-PRN-01', which is queried in export_result.sh.
Task description mandates a Purchase Cost of '450', which is queried by export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetic setup. It was verified via `setup_task.sh` and `export_result.sh` that the agent must create and configure a Location named 'Berlin Branch' (Currency: EUR) and Supplier named 'Berlin Tech Wholesale'. The agent is required to reassign the pre-existing user (Klaus Weber) to a 'Country Manager' title, move his provisioned laptop 'ASSET-MAC-088' to the new branch, and create a new printer model 'HP Color LaserJet Pro M479fdw' and asset 'ASSET-BER-PRN-01' with a cost of 450.
